title: pleurospermum austriacum subsp. uralense
intro: Pleurospermum austriacum subsp. uralense is a subspecies of the Pleurospermum austriacum plant, a type of fern that belongs to the carrot family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pleurospermum austriacum subsp. uralense include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to exhibit antiviral and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
